# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: direct-access
  labels:
    istio-injection: disabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-sa
  namespace: direct-access
automountServiceAccountToken: true
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-role
  namespace: direct-access
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["services", "endpoints"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-rolebinding
  namespace: direct-access
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: low-latency-service-sa
  namespace: direct-access
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: low-latency-service-role
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: low-latency-config
  namespace: direct-access
data:
  app.conf: |
    server.port=8080
    network.mode=direct
    security.tls.enabled=true
    security.tls.cert=/etc/certs/tls.crt
    security.tls.key=/etc/certs/tls.key
    security.mtls.enabled=true
    security.mtls.ca=/etc/certs/ca.crt
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: low-latency-tls
  namespace: direct-access
type: kubernetes.io/tls
stringData:
  tls.crt: |
    -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
    MIIDXTCCAkWgAwIBAgIJAKL0UG+mRKKzMA0GCSqGSIb3DQEBCwUAMEUxCzAJBgNV
    BAYTAkFVMRMwEQYDVQQIDApTb21lLVN0YXRlMSEwHwYDVQQKDBhJbnRlcm5ldCBX
    aWRnaXRzIFB0eSBMdGQwHhcNMjQwMTAxMDAwMDAwWhcNMjUwMTAxMDAwMDAwWjBF
    MQswCQYDVQQGEwJBVTETMBEGA1UECAwKU29tZS1TdGF0ZTEhMB8GA1UECgwYSW50
    ZXJuZXQgV2lkZ2l0cyBQdHkgTHRkMIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIB
    CgKCAQEA0Z3V
    -----END CERTIFICATE-----
  tls.key: |
    -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----
    MIIEvQIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAASCBKcwggSjAgEAAoIBAQDRndXqZ
    -----END PRIVATE KEY-----
  ca.crt: |
    -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
    MIIDXTCCAkWgAwIBAgIJAKL0UG+mRKKzMA0GCSqGSIb3DQEBCwUAMEUxCzAJBgNV
    -----END CERTIFICATE-----
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: https
  selector:
    app: low-latency-service
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "9090"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: low-latency-service-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: your-registry/low-latency-service:v1.0.0
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: https
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 9090
          name: metrics
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: POD_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        - name: POD_NAMESPACE
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: metadata.namespace
        - name: TLS_CERT_PATH
          value: /etc/certs/tls.crt
        - name: TLS_KEY_PATH
          value: /etc/certs/tls.key
        - name: CA_CERT_PATH
          value: /etc/certs/ca.crt
        - name: ENABLE_MTLS
          value: "true"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: config
          mountPath: /etc/config
          readOnly: true
        - name: tls-certs
          mountPath: /etc/certs
          readOnly: true
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health/live
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTPS
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health/ready
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTPS
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
      volumes:
      - name: config
        configMap:
          name: low-latency-config
      - name: tls-certs
        secret:
          secretName: low-latency-tls
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchExpressions:
                - key: app
                  operator: In
                  values:
                  - low-latency-service
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-direct-access
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: database-direct-access
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-direct-access
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-direct-access
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: low-latency-service-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1001
        fsGroup: 1001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: database-client
        image: your-registry/database-client:v1.0.0
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          name: postgres
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: DB_HOST
          value: postgres.database.svc.cluster.local
        - name: DB_PORT
          value: "5432"
        - name: DB_SSL_MODE
          value: require
        - name: DB_SSL_CERT
          value: /etc/db-certs/client.crt
        - name: DB_SSL_KEY
          value: /etc/db-certs/client.key
        - name: DB_SSL_ROOT_CERT
          value: /etc/db-certs/ca.crt
        - name: DB_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: database-credentials
              key: username
        - name: DB_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: database-credentials
              key: password
        volumeMounts:
        - name: db-certs
          mountPath: /etc/db-certs
          readOnly: true
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1001
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        livenessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 5432
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 5432
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
      volumes:
      - name: db-certs
        secret:
          secretName: database-client-certs
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: database-credentials
  namespace: direct-access
type: Opaque
stringData:
  username: dbuser
  password: securepassword123
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: database-client-certs
  namespace: direct-access
type: Opaque
stringData:
  client.crt: |
    -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
    MIIDXTCCAkWgAwIBAgIJAKL0UG+mRKKzMA0GCSqGSIb3DQEBCwUAMEUxCzAJBgNV
    -----END CERTIFICATE-----
  client.key: |
    -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----
    MIIEvQIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAASCBKcwggSjAgEAAoIBAQDRndXqZ
    -----END PRIVATE KEY-----
  ca.crt: |
    -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
    MIIDXTCCAkWgAwIBAgIJAKL0UG+mRKKzMA0GCSqGSIb3DQEBCwUAMEUxCzAJBgNV
    -----END CERTIFICATE-----
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-direct-access
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: database-direct-access
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
    protocol: TCP
    name: postgres
  selector:
    app: database-direct-access
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: cache-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cache-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: low-latency-service-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 999
        fsGroup: 999
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: redis
        image: redis:7-alpine
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        command:
        - redis-server
        - /etc/redis/redis.conf
        - --requirepass
        - $(REDIS_PASSWORD)
        - --tls-port
        - "6379"
        - --port
        - "0"
        - --tls-cert-file
        - /etc/redis-certs/tls.crt
        - --tls-key-file
        - /etc/redis-certs/tls.key
        - --tls-ca-cert-file
        - /etc/redis-certs/ca.crt
        - --tls-auth-clients
        - "yes"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          name: redis-tls
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: redis-credentials
              key: password
        volumeMounts:
        - name: redis-config
          mountPath: /etc/redis
          readOnly: true
        - name: redis-certs
          mountPath: /etc/redis-certs
          readOnly: true
        - name: redis-data
          mountPath: /data
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 999
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - redis-cli --tls --cert /etc/redis-certs/tls.crt --key /etc/redis-certs/tls.key --cacert /etc/redis-certs/ca.crt -a $REDIS_PASSWORD ping
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - redis-cli --tls --cert /etc/redis-certs/tls.crt --key /etc/redis-certs/tls.key --cacert /etc/redis-certs/ca.crt -a $REDIS_PASSWORD ping
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
      volumes:
      - name: redis-config
        configMap:
          name: redis-config
      - name: redis-certs
        secret:
          secretName: redis-tls-certs
      - name: redis-data
        emptyDir: {}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: redis-config
  namespace: direct-access
data:
  redis.conf: |
    maxmemory 256mb
    maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
    save ""
    appendonly no
    protected-mode yes
    bind 0.0.0.0
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: redis-credentials
  namespace: direct-access
type: Opaque
stringData:
  password: redissecurepassword456
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: redis-tls-certs
  namespace: direct-access
type: kubernetes.io/tls
stringData:
  tls.crt: |
    -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
    MIIDXTCCAkWgAwIBAgIJAKL0UG+mRKKzMA0GCSqGSIb3DQEBCwUAMEUxCzAJBgNV
    -----END CERTIFICATE-----
  tls.key: |
    -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----
    MIIEvQIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAASCBKcwggSjAgEAAoIBAQDRndXqZ
    -----END PRIVATE KEY-----
  ca.crt: |
    -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
    MIIDXTCCAkWgAwIBAgIJAKL0UG+mRKKzMA0GCSqGSIb3DQEBCwUAMEUxCzAJBgNV
    -----END CERTIFICATE-----
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: cache-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
    protocol: TCP
    name: redis-tls
  selector:
    app: cache-service
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-pdb
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: cache-service-pdb
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-service
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: direct-access-network-policy
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: direct-access
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: low-latency-service
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080
  egress:
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: direct-access
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: cache-service
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: database-direct-access
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 6379
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 5432
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: cache-network-policy
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-service
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: direct-access
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: low-latency-service
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 6379
  egress:
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-network-policy
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-direct-access
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: direct-access
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: low-latency-service
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 5432
  egress:
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 5432
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53
